name: Instagram: Post Comment
description: Post one text comment on an Instagram post or reel URL. Each call creates a new public comment attributed to the signed-in account, so callers are responsible for deduping — this workflow does NOT check whether the same comment already exists before posting. Use this for low-volume, human-like engagement only; Instagram rate-limits rapid commenting aggressively. Do not use this to reply to a specific comment (reply-threads need a different entry point).

help.summary: Post one top-level comment on an Instagram post or reel.

parameters.name: post_url
parameters.description: Full Instagram post, reel, or tv URL.

parameters.name: comment_text
parameters.description: Text body of the comment. Typed character-by-character into the composer textarea. Instagram enforces a 2200-character limit; this workflow rejects longer strings.

examples.description: Post a short comment on a specific post
examples.command: rzn-browser run instagram post-comment --param post_url="https://www.instagram.com/p/DXexrK0De7B/" --param comment_text="Great shot!"

help.returns: JSON with post_url, comment_text_preview (first 80 chars), and status: one of posted | login_required | not_found | composer_not_found | submit_disabled | submit_button_not_found | click_failed | over_length. On posted, also returns submit_click=true.
notes: Requires a logged-in Instagram session in the active Chrome profile; returns status=login_required if signed out.
Opens a dedicated workflow tab (use_current_tab=false), so this workflow is safe to run in parallel with other dedicated-tab instagram flows.
Not idempotent: every call posts a new comment. Dedupe in the caller if needed.
The composer is a textarea with aria-label 'Add a comment…' and the submit button is labeled 'Post' or 'Share' depending on Instagram's surface. Both labels are handled.
Over-length guard: strings longer than 2200 characters return over_length without opening the composer.

browser_automation.description: Opens a dedicated workflow tab, navigates to one post, focuses the comment composer, types the message with real keystrokes, and clicks the submit button when it becomes enabled.

sequences.name: instagram_post_comment
sequences.description: Post a single top-level comment on one post or reel.

required_variables.name: post_url
required_variables.description: Full Instagram post or reel URL

steps.name: Allow the post page to settle
Allow the post page extra time to hydrate
Type the comment and submit
